items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these checks, yet the prior step evidence lacks any relevant information regarding eligibility checks based on status. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
